zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Forrester於1410年出生在蘇格蘭艾丁波時，她的父親Sir John Forrester 2nd of Corstorphine26歲，母親Margaret Malone Forrester35歲。她於1366年之前與Robert Maxwell結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1488年在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡爾德武德享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Forrester于1410年出生在苏格兰艾丁波时，她的父亲Sir John Forrester 2nd of Corstorphine26岁，母亲Margaret Malone Forrester35岁。她于1366年之前与Robert Maxwell结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1488年在英国苏格兰藍納可爾卡爾德武德享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Forrester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English forester ‘officer in charge of a forest or lord's hunting ground’ (Old French forestier, Anglo-Norman forester). See Forrest .

variants.name: Forrest
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived in or near a royal forest, or a metonymic occupational name for a keeper or worker in one. Middle English forest was not, as today, a near-synonym of wood, but referred specifically to a large area of woodland reserved by law for the purposes of hunting by the king and his nobles. The same applied to the European cognates, both ancient Germanic and Romance. The English word is from Middle English forest ‘forest’, Old French forest, Late Latin forestis (silva). This is generally taken to be a derivative of foris ‘outside’; the reference was probably to woods lying outside a settlement. On the other hand, Middle High German for(e)st has been held to be a derivative of Old High German foraha ‘fir’ (see Forster ), with the addition of a collective suffix.
Irish: this name is also frequently attested in Ireland, where it may be a variant of   Forrestal  .

variants.name: Forester
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Forrester   (see   Forrest  ).

variants.name: Forrister
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Forrester  .

variants.name: Forster
meanings: English: shortened form of   Forrester  , an occupational name for someone who worked in a forest.
English: possibly a Norman French nickname or occupational name from Old French forcetier ‘maker of scissors or shears, cutler’. Compare Force and Forse .

German (mainly Förster): agent derivative of Middle High German forst ‘forest’, denoting someone who lived in or near a royal forest, or who worked in one (see Forst ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Foerster .

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Forrester was born in 1410, in Edinburgh, Scotland, her father, Sir John Forrester 2nd of Corstorphine, was 26 and her mother, Margaret Malone Forrester, was 35. She married Robert Maxwell before 1366. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1488, in Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Forrester est née en 1410, à Edinburgh, Écosse, son père, Sir John Forrester 2nd of Corstorphine, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Malone Forrester, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Maxwell avant 1366. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1488, à Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Forrester 1410 in Edinburgh, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Forrester 2nd of Corstorphine 26 und ihre Mutter Margaret Malone Forrester 35. Sie hat vor 1366 Robert Maxwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1488 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Forrester è nata il nel 1410 nel Edinburgh, Scotland, sua padre, Sir John Forrester 2nd of Corstorphine, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Margaret Malone Forrester, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Robert Maxwell prima del 1366. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1488, nel Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Forresterが1410年にスコットランドエディンブルグで生まれた時，父Sir John Forrester 2nd of Corstorphineは26歳，母Margaret Malone Forresterは35歳であった。1366年以前にRobert Maxwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1488年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアカルデルウッドで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Forrester(이)가 1410년 스컷랜드 에딘버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Forrester 2nd of Corstorphine(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Malone Forrester(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1366년 이전 Robert Maxwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1488년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 캘더우드에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Forrester nasceu em 1410, em Edinburgh, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Forrester 2nd of Corstorphine, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Malone Forrester, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Maxwell antes 1366. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1488, em Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Forrester родилась в 1410 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John Forrester 2nd of Corstorphine было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Malone Forrester, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Maxwell перед 1366 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1488 г. в местности калдирвуд, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet Forrester nació en 1410, en Edinburgh, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Forrester 2nd of Corstorphine, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Malone Forrester, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Robert Maxwell antes de 1366. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1488, en Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años.
